sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36317" key="e)ntri/xwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντρῐ´χ-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n36317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">edges of the eyelids, eyelashes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.69</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n36317.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hair-sieve,</tr_> also <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠθμός,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.912e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
